school.name: The Schoolhouse
school.description: Each teacher at the schoolhouse leads a different class in a different room. Work out who teaches what, and where.
clues: Choir goes with 76%.
Period 2 goes with exactly two of Hale, Chess, and 74%.
Either 80% goes with Drama or Period 6 goes with Scouts.

Period 2 goes with exactly one of Carver, Drama, or Scouts.

Carver goes with exactly two of Drama, 72%, and Period 4.
Period 3, Period 5, and Period 6 go with Chess, Debate, and Scouts, in some order.
If 78% goes with Dunn, then all of Drama goes with 74%, Period 5 goes with Dunn, and Hale goes with Drama.

chess.name: The Chess Club
